calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-057b BetaGate Fixed — routes through agent.select_action()
items.description: Rewrite of EXQ-048. Fix: call agent.select_action(candidates, ticks) instead of agent.e3.select() directly. Bug: previous script bypassed beta_gate wiring in agent.select_action() — gate never exercised, hold_count=0. PASS: C1 committed_steps>=10, C2 hold_rate_during_committed>0.5, C3 propagation_count>0, C4 cal_gap>0.

items.title: MECH-090 BetaGate Fixed — routes through agent.select_action()
items.description: Rewrite of EXQ-049. Same fix as EXQ-048b. PASS: C1 committed_hold_concordance>0.6, C2 uncommitted_release_concordance>0.5, C3 hold_count>0, C4 propagation_count>0.

items.title: SD-006 Multirate Fixed — correct ThetaBuffer counter
items.description: Rewrite of EXQ-052. Fix: len(agent.theta_buffer) instead of len(agent.theta_buffer._buffer). Bug: _buffer attribute does not exist; AttributeError silently caught, max_theta_buffer_size=0. All other metrics (cal_gap=0.846, e3_tick_ratio=0.109) already pass.

items.title: MECH-025 Doing Mode — relative threshold calibration
items.description: Rewrite of EXQ-050. Calibrates commit_threshold = 2.0 x training_baseline_variance so agent enters both committed and uncommitted modes. Prerequisite: EXQ-018b establishes relative threshold works. PASS: doing_mode_delta>0.002, uncommitted_step_count>=10.

items.title: ARC-007 Path Memory Ablation (Proper) — residue field zeroing degrades hippocampal proposals
items.description: Prerequisite: EXQ-042 PASS. Tests ARC-007 STRICT (Q-020): hippocampal proposals are value-flat, relying entirely on residue field geometry. Protocol: P1 train (600 eps), P2 eval intact, P3 ablate (zero residue field via monkeypatch), P4 eval ablated, P5 restore, P6 eval restored. PASS: C1 hippo_quality_gap_intact>0, C2 ablated<=intact*0.5, C3 restored>=ablated, C4 cal_gap_approach>0.03, C5 no errors.

items.title: SD-010 Reafference Isolation — z_harm survives reafference correction (EXQ-027b retest)
items.description: Direct retest of EXQ-027b with SD-010. z_harm from HarmEncoder(harm_obs) is architecturally separate from z_world and never enters the reafference pipeline. Tests: calibration_gap_z_harm>0.03 (same threshold as EXQ-027b), harm_pred_std_z_harm>0.01, reafference_r2_z_world>0.10, n_agent_hazard_steps>=5, identity_test_pass==1.0.

items.title: ARC-016 Dynamic Precision Commitment Test (hazard_harm=0.02, alpha_world=0.9)
items.description: FIXED 2026-03-18 (run 4): Calibrated thresholds from run 3 measurements (stable_var≈0.0027, perturbed_var≈0.0038). C1 threshold 0.02→0.001 (original assumed 10× higher variance than trained E2 achieves). E3Config.commitment_threshold 0.02→0.003 (sits between stable/perturbed → real commit rate differential). (Prior fixes: e2w_loss training, alpha_world=0.9, variance-space formula, extreme env contrast.) PASS: var_diff>0.001 AND prec_diff>0 AND commit_diff>0.

items.title: MECH-100 Event-Auxiliary Contrastive Encoder Loss (hazard_harm=0.02, alpha=0.9)
items.description: FIXED: hazard_harm=0.02, alpha_world=0.9, warmup=1000. Tests SD-009/MECH-100: CE event classifier (Linear(world_dim,3)) backprops through z_world encoder. Labels: 0=none, 1=env_caused_hazard, 2=agent_caused_hazard. λ_event=0.5. PASS C1: calibration_gap>0.05, C2: event_classification_acc>0.5, C3: selectivity_margin>0.005.

items.title: Event-Auxiliary Contrastive Encoder Loss — Seed 1
items.description: Repeat of EXQ-020 with seed=1 for robustness.

items.title: Event-Auxiliary Contrastive Loss — Strong λ=2.0 (hazard_harm=0.02, alpha=0.9)
items.description: FIXED: hazard_harm=0.02, alpha_world=0.9, warmup=1000. EXQ-020 variant with λ_event=2.0 (4× stronger contrastive signal). If EXQ-020 achieves classification accuracy but not calibration_gap, tests whether stronger CE loss helps. Risk: forgetting of E1/E2 reconstruction.

items.title: CausalGridWorldV2 Proxy-Gradient Field Validation
items.description: Prerequisite for EXQ-029. Tests ARC-024: does CausalGridWorldV2 generate observable harm/benefit gradient signals before contact events? Inverts EXQ-006 failure condition: mean_dz_world_hazard_approach > mean_dz_world_none. Random policy, no agent training. PASS: C1 gradient_dominance (approach > none), C2 gradient_magnitude > 0.02, C4 ema_accumulation (harm_exposure higher at approach than none).

items.title: ARC-016 Dynamic Precision — Seed 1 (independent validation)
items.description: Seed-1 repeat of EXQ-018 PASS. EXQ-018 thresholds were calibrated from run-3 measurements then confirmed in run-4 — weak evidence pattern. Seed-1 provides independent confirmation that var_diff>0.001, prec_diff>0, commit_diff>0 are not seed-specific.

items.title: ARC-027 / SD-010: Harm Stream Calibration — z_harm vs z_world calibration gap
items.description: Validates SD-010 harm stream produces calibrated signal that persists through reafference correction. Trains HarmEncoder(harm_obs→z_harm) and baseline z_world harm_eval in parallel. PASS: C1 cal_gap_z_harm_approach>0, C2 >0.03, C3 n_approach>=30, C4 world_forward_r2>0.05, C5 z_harm better than z_world baseline.

items.title: ARC-016 / MECH-057b / MECH-090: Beta Gate with Fixed Commit Threshold (0.40)
items.description: Replication of EXQ-048 with corrected commit_threshold=0.40 (was 0.003 — 25000x below actual running_variance ~0.33). Tests: C1 committed_step_count>=10 (ARC-016 fires), C2 committed_and_elevated>0 (MECH-090), C3 hold_rate>0.3 (MECH-057b), C4 gate_release_events>0, C5 cal_gap_approach>0.
